replies_today.reply: Kash Patel is the current Director of the FBI, sworn in on February 21, 2025. Christopher Wray was the previous Director, serving until January 20, 2025.
Political violence is complex. Both sides use inflammatory rhetoric. Framing it as solely one party's fault misleads by ignoring broader context.
Defunding Forest and National Park Services is largely accurate. Budget cuts impact operations, staffing, and services. Accountability needed for those claiming support while cutting funds.
